title: ACEF Event Log Payload
description: Payload schema for event_log records. Captures automatic system event records per EU AI Act Art. 12 and China CAC labeling measures. Includes normative minimum required fields per spec Section 3.1.5. Supports the logging_spec variant via the event_type discriminator field.

event_type.description: Type of system event. The 'logging_spec' value indicates a logging specification variant that describes what a system logs and why.

correlation_id.description: Links related events across log entries and to human_oversight_action records.

inputs_commitment.description: Hash commitment of input data. Avoids storing raw PII while enabling traceability.

hash.description: Hex-encoded hash of the input data.

outputs_commitment.description: Hash commitment of output data. Avoids storing raw PII while enabling traceability.

hash.description: Hex-encoded hash of the output data.

retention_start_event.description: When the retention clock starts for this log entry. Resolves ambiguity in computing retention windows.

actor_ref.description: URN of the actor who triggered the event (urn:acef:act:<uuid>).

label_exception.description: True if explicit label was omitted by user request, triggering CAC 6-month retention obligation.

system_state.description: System state at the time of the event.

latency_ms.description: Latency in milliseconds for the operation.

error_code.description: Error code if the event is an error event.

error_message.description: Error message if the event is an error event.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of input data (simplified alternative to inputs_commitment).

output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of output data (simplified alternative to outputs_commitment).

logged_event_types.description: Event types that the system logs (for logging_spec variant).

log_fields_documented.description: Fields documented in log entries (for logging_spec variant).

traceability_rationale.description: Rationale for the logging approach (for logging_spec variant). Explains how logs enable identification of risk situations per Art. 12(1).

retention_policy_summary.description: Summary of retention policy (for logging_spec variant).

legal_basis.description: Legal basis for the retention policy.
